title: triticum dicoccum var. schimperi
intro: Triticum dicoccum var. schimperi, also known as Schimperi emmer wheat, is a variety of emmer wheat that is native to North Africa and the Middle East. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Triticum dicoccum var. schimperi include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used as a dietary supplement.
